action.reasoning: Observation: 19 iterations with no eval submitted. Model trained in iter 10, saved at checkpoints/merged_model/. Data location unclear. Need to urgently find data, test predict.py, and submit eval. Decision: Systematically find data paths, test predict.py on a few samples, then submit eval immediately.
action.command: echo '=== ALL DATA LOCATIONS ===' && find /data -maxdepth 2 -name '*.jsonl' 2>/dev/null && find /data -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null && echo '=== CHECK TRAIN DATA ===' && ls /data/train_data/ 2>/dev/null && head -1 /data/train_data/unified_train.jsonl 2>/dev/null && echo '=== CHECK VAL ===' && find / -maxdepth 4 -name 'unified_val.jsonl' 2>/dev/null && echo '=== CHECK IMAGES ===' && ls /data/train_data/images/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo '=== CHECK MERGED MODEL ===' && ls checkpoints/merged_model/
